title: Mechanical gate-bypass Stop-hook net (#18)
action: Add encodeBlock(reason) to hooks/adapter.mjs (pure {decision:'block',reason} JSON, Stop-only usage). In hooks/bee-session-close.mjs add maybeBypassBlock(root, ctx) wired into main() BEFORE the advisory 'hive door open' block: fire ONLY when ctx.event==='Stop' AND resolved phase in {planning,validating} AND that phase's pending gate (planning->shape, validating->execution) is not approved AND bypassLevel covers it (full/total always; normal only when mode in {tiny,small,standard}); loop-guard via inject.mjs shouldInject/markInjected keyed sessionId:phase:gate:level (block once, degrade to advisory on same-key repeat). When it fires, emit the block decision (auto-approve+continue instruction) and return, replacing the advisory. Fail-open: wrap, any crash logs and falls through to advisory/exit 0. PreCompact and SubagentStop must NEVER block. Write hooks/test_bypass_stop_net.mjs covering fire/no-fire matrix, loop-guard, fail-open.

truths: Fires only on ctx.event==='Stop' — PreCompact and SubagentStop never block
planning->shape, validating->execution; only when that gate is pending
full/total cover all lanes; normal covers only mode in {tiny,small,standard}; off never fires
exploring/Gate 1 is never mechanized (info questions still stop under total)
loop-guard blocks once per sessionId:phase:gate:level then degrades to advisory
prohibitions: advisory path must remain when net does not fire

verify: node hooks/test_bypass_stop_net.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node scripts/test_gate_bypass_doctrine.mjs && node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs && node hooks/test_write_guard.mjs

trace.verification_evidence: Mechanical gate-bypass Stop-hook net (GitHub #18). hooks/test_bypass_stop_net.mjs: 14/14 rows ALL PASS covering: total+planning→block(Gate2), total+validating→block(Gate3), loop-guard block-once-then-advisory, exploring excluded, gate-already-approved no-op, off never fires, normal+standard block / normal+high-risk no block, PreCompact never blocks, empty-event fail-safe, throwing-inject fail-open exit 0. Regression: node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs ALL PASS; node scripts/test_gate_bypass_doctrine.mjs PASS 0 failures; test_model_guard + test_write_guard ALL PASS.
